title: othocallis siberica subsp. armena
intro: Othocallis siberica subsp. armena, also known as the Armenian iris, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Othocallis siberica subsp. armena is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is said to be effective in treating conditions like eczema, acne, and skin irritations.
